scripts.gen:templates:html: node .github/skills/find-incomplete-functions/scan-incomplete.js . --json > /tmp/incomplete.json && node .github/skills/find-incomplete-functions/generate-implementation.js /tmp/incomplete.json --html incomplete-report.html && echo '✅ Report: incomplete-report.html'
scripts.audit:incomplete: npm run scan:incomplete && echo '' && node .github/skills/find-incomplete-functions/scan-incomplete.js . --json > /tmp/incomplete.json && node .github/skills/find-incomplete-functions/generate-implementation.js /tmp/incomplete.json
